source: FIFA WC2026 appointments + Football-Data.org/FBref historical data
caveats: Baseline 0.58 reflects international/major tournament home win rate. Statshub-derived splits are domestic-league heavy (typical home win ~0.45), so qualified bonuses skew negative as a baseline artifact, not necessarily as true ref bias.

Only 4 of 52 FIFA-appointed referees have publicly retrievable home/draw/away splits via indexed snippets (Statshub). The remaining 48 are recorded with n_matches=0 and home_elo_bonus=0.0 per the honesty floor.
cards_per_game and pen_rate_per_match are recorded where reputable aggregator snippets surfaced them, but are not used by the formula and do not gate the bonus.
Final FIFA list confirmed on 2026-04-09; this proposal reflects that 52-referee roster.

Szymon Marciniak.notes: Statshub aggregate 84W/50D/46L (home win 46.7%); cards/pen from Transfermarkt career splits.

Clement Turpin.notes: Statshub aggregate 77W/55D/64L (home win 39.3%); cards/pen from FBref senior career.

Istvan Kovacs.notes: Statshub aggregate 80W/54D/57L (home win 41.9%); cards/pen from UEFA/Liga 1 records.

Glenn Nyberg.notes: Statshub aggregate 58W/42D/40L (home win 41.4%); cards/pen from Allsvenskan/UEFA records.

Anthony Taylor.notes: FIFA WC2026 appointment (Wikipedia). Home/draw/away split not retrievable via indexed snippets; n_matches=0 per honesty floor. Cards/pen from FBref Premier League career.
